title: Rivian Analyst Price Targets and Ratings 2025-2026
text: Rivian Automotive has a consensus price target of $17.52 based on the ratings of 27 analysts. The high target is $25 issued by Benchmark on May 1, 2026, while the low is $10 issued by JP Morgan on October 20, 2025. Several analysts have upgraded their outlooks on Rivian in 2026. Deutsche Bank upgraded their outlook from Hold to Buy on February 13, 2026. TD Cowen upgraded their outlook from Hold to Buy on March 10, 2026. DA Davidson analyst Michael Shlisky raised the firm's price target on Rivian to $15 from $14 and keeps a Neutral rating on the shares. In the current month, RIVN has received 15 Buy Ratings, 14 Hold Ratings, and 7 Sell Ratings. The 19 analysts that cover Rivian Automotive stock have a consensus rating of Buy and an average price target of $17.74, which forecasts a 11.36% increase in the stock price over the next year. The upgrades and positive sentiment are largely attributed to factors like the upcoming R2 launch and strategic partnerships with companies like Volkswagen.
